requiredChecks: Every custom CCSB table logical name starts with ccsb_ and is lowercase.
Every proposed table has primary id ccsb_<entity>id and primary name ccsb_name.
Every custom field starts with ccsb_, except Dataverse system columns.
Every lookup field ends with id and its target table exists in current or proposed metadata.
Every new relationship uses Delete Restrict unless an explicit architecture decision approves otherwise.
Alternate key fields are Text, Whole Number, Decimal, DateTime, Choice, or Lookup; are not field-secured; and stay below Dataverse key size limits.
New fields on existing tables are optional at metadata level, then enforced by validation at activation/publish time.
No existing logical name is renamed or dropped in a minor release.
Payload, image, diagnostic, reason, and actor display fields are either minimized or field-secured.
Evidence/control tables have table audit enabled and are protected by server-side append-only/update rules.
backwardCompatibilityRules: Additive tables and optional columns are minor-version compatible.
Changing type, logical name, ownership, or key composition is major-version breaking.
Changing choice integer values is breaking; adding new choice values is minor-version compatible when consumers tolerate unknown values.
Tightening a required field at metadata level is breaking for existing environments; enforce requiredness through activation validation first.
